bluetooth_confirm.title: EnOcean BLE Discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: {name} was discovered. Click Submit to start commissioning.

commissioning_hold_2.title: Auto-Commissioning Step 3
commissioning_hold_2.description: Hold button 1 again for 7 seconds on {name}.

commissioning_exit_mode.title: Auto-Commissioning Step 5
commissioning_exit_mode.description: Commissioning successful. Press button 2 on {name} to turn off auto-commissioning mode.

progress.hold_button_1_7s: Hold button 1 for 7 seconds. Waiting for first hold sequence...
progress.click_button_1_briefly: Press button 1 briefly. Waiting for A0 press telegram...
progress.hold_button_1_again_7s: Hold button 1 again for 7 seconds. Waiting for second hold...
progress.click_button_1_again_briefly: Click button 1 briefly again. Waiting for commissioning confirmation telegram (LEN=26)...
progress.click_another_button_to_exit_commissioni: Commissioning successful. Press button 2 (A1) to turn off auto-commissioning mode...

abort.no_bluetooth_discovery: This setup must start from a discovered Bluetooth device.
abort.not_enocean_prefix: This discovered device does not use the EnOcean BLE MAC prefix (E2:15).

error.commissioning_not_detected: Commissioning mode failed to activate. Try again.
error.commissioning_not_active: Commissioning mode is not active (expected LEN=26 telegram). Try again from the beginning.
error.invalid_commissioning: A commissioning telegram was received but could not be parsed.
